languages.text: "У каждого из них свои цели. Ксенобиологис Оксильда Таванти больше всего заинтересована в тайнах геноконструирования. Магос Тау-Фи-0098 в первую очередь известен использованием своих исследований в целях истребления угроз Человечества. Каис-торр-Шайга призывает подумать о выгодах, которые можно извлечь из Заркова".

traits.locale_text: "У каждого из них свои цели. Ксенобиологис Оксильда Таванти больше всего заинтересована в тайнах геноконструирования. Магос Тау-Фи-0098 в первую очередь известен использованием своих исследований в целях истребления угроз Человечества. Каис-торр-Шайга призывает подумать о выгодах, которые можно извлечь из Заркова".

languages.text: "They each have their own goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research to purge threats facing Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga urges consideration of the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."
languages.original_text: "У каждого из них свои цели. Ксенобиологис Оксильда Таванти больше всего заинтересована в тайнах геноконструирования. Магос Тау-Фи-0098 в первую очередь известен использованием своих исследований в целях истребления угроз Человечества. Каис-торр-Шайга призывает подумать о выгодах, которые можно извлечь из Заркова".

traits.locale_text: "They each have their own goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research to purge the threats facing Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

"They each have their own end goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research for the security of Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research for the security of Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research to purge the threats facing Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

"They each have their own goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research to purge threats facing Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga urges consideration of the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

languages.text: 「それぞれが独自の目標を持っている。遺伝子工学の謎に興味を持つゼノ生物学者オキシルダ・タヴァンティ。人類の安全を研究の目的とするマゴス・タウ・フィ・0098。そしてカイストル・シャイガは、ザルコフから得られる恩恵について考えるよう促している」
languages.original_text: "They each have their own end goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research for the security of Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga is urging us to think about the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: 「それぞれが独自の目標を持っている。遺伝子工学の謎に興味を持つゼノ生物学者オキシルダ・タヴァンティ。人類の安全を研究の目的とするマゴス・タウ・フィ・0098。そしてカイストル・シャイガは、ザルコフから得られる恩恵について考えるよう促している。」

languages.text: «Cada uno tiene sus propios objetivos. La xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti está principalmente interesada en los misterios de la ingeniería genética. El magos Tau-Fi-0098 es famoso por sus investigaciones para exterminar las amenazas a la Humanidad. Kais-torr-Shaiga nos insta a pensar en todos los beneficios que podemos extraer de Zarkov».
languages.original_text: "They each have their own goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research to purge threats facing Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga urges consideration of the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: «Cada uno tiene sus propios objetivos. La xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti está principalmente interesada en los misterios de la ingeniería genética. El magos Tau-Fi-0098 es famoso por sus investigaciones para exterminar las amenazas a la Humanidad. Kais-torr-Shaiga nos insta a pensar en todos los beneficios que podemos extraer de Zarkov».

languages.text: “三人的目的各不相同：异形生物贤者，奥克西尔达·塔凡蒂的主要兴趣在于基因工程的奥秘；贤者陶-斐-0098希望利用他的研究来清除人类面临的威胁；而凯斯-托尔-夏迦则敦促我们关注扎尔科夫能够带来的价值。”
languages.original_text: "They each have their own goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research to purge threats facing Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga urges consideration of the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: “三人的目的各不相同：异形生物贤者，奥克西尔达·塔凡蒂的主要兴趣在于基因工程的奥秘；贤者陶-斐-0098希望利用他的研究来清除人类面临的威胁；而凯斯-托尔-夏迦则敦促我们关注扎尔科夫能够带来的价值。”

languages.text: "Sie haben alle eigene Ziele. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti interessiert sich vor allem für die Geheimnisse der Genmanipulation. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 ist in erster Linie für seine Forschung hinsichtlich der Auslöschung aller Bedrohungen für die Menschheit bekannt. Kais-torr-Shaiga drängt uns, die Vorteile zu bedenken, die uns Zarkov bieten könnte."
languages.original_text: "They each have their own goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research to purge threats facing Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga urges consideration of the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: "Sie haben alle eigene Ziele. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti interessiert sich vor allem für die Geheimnisse der Genmanipulation. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 ist in erster Linie für seine Forschung hinsichtlich der Auslöschung aller Bedrohungen für die Menschheit bekannt. Kais-torr-Shaiga drängt uns, die Vorteile zu bedenken, die uns Zarkov bieten könnte."

languages.text: "Her birinin kendi hedefleri var. Zenobiyologis Oksilda Tavanti, esasen genetik mühendisliğinin gizemleriyle ilgileniyor. Magos Tau-Fi-0098, öncelikle İnsanlığın karşılaştığı tehditleri ortadan kaldırmak için yaptığı araştırmalarla bilinir. Kais-torr-Shaiga ise Zarkov'dan elde edilebilecek faydaların değerlendirilmesini teşvik ediyor."
languages.original_text: "They each have their own goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research to purge threats facing Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga urges consideration of the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: "Her birinin kendi hedefleri var. Zenobiyologis Oksilda Tavanti, esasen genetik mühendisliğinin gizemleriyle ilgileniyor. Magos Tau-Fi-0098, öncelikle İnsanlığın karşılaştığı tehditleri ortadan kaldırmak için yaptığı araştırmalarla bilinir. Kais-torr-Shaiga ise Zarkov'dan elde edilebilecek faydaların değerlendirilmesini teşvik ediyor."

languages.text: « Chacun d'entre eux poursuit ses propres objectifs. La xénobiologiste Oksilda Tavanti s'intéresse principalement aux mystères de l'ingénierie génétique. Le magos Tau-Phi-0098 est surtout connu pour utiliser ses recherches afin d'anéantir les menaces visant l'humanité. Kais-torr-Shaiga nous invite à réfléchir aux avantages et aux richesses que nous pourrions tirer de Zarkov. »
languages.original_text: "They each have their own goals. Xenobiologis Oksilda Tavanti is mainly interested in the mysteries of genetic engineering. Magos Tau-Phi-0098 is primarily known for using his research to purge threats facing Humanity. Kais-torr-Shaiga urges consideration of the benefits that could be derived from Zarkov."
